title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client; sync & async support, streaming, embeddings, chat, generate, list, pull, push.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs and embeddings for chains, agents, RAG.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, streaming, chat, generate, pull, list, embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for chatting, model management, and conversation history stored locally.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Continue plugin to use Ollama models as local GitHub Copilot replacements inside VS Code/JetBrains.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that exposes Ollama models as slash commands with per-guild model selection.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistence support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder for pipelines.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models in a sidebar buffer, generate code, or refactor selections.

title: ollama-express
summary: Official example showing how to wrap Ollama with an Express proxy adding CORS and auth.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration injecting an Ollama4j client bean for rapid Java development.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with chat, generate, embeddings, and streaming support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLMs.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, custom Modelfiles, integrations, and troubleshooting.
